creator: Matthew
source_text: Episode 5 of Meals for an Athlete: Chicken Pho! I love all the different things you can make with the Costco rotisserie chicken! Super cheap and high in protein which is exactly what I’m looking for in my meals while I’m training. #highproteinmeals #rotisseriechicken #easyrecipe
notes: Agent-labeled from the frozen Instagram description before viewing parser output.
